title: Easy Parasaurolophus Coloring Page
seoTitle: Easy Parasaurolophus Kids Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Get creative with this simple Parasaurolophus coloring sheet for young kids. Easy to color with crayons. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: The hollow crest of Parasaurolophus acted as a resonance chamber to produce loud, low-frequency trumpeting calls to communicate with its herd.
Parasaurolophus could walk on two legs for running or graze on all four legs, possessing dental batteries of hundreds of teeth.
